title: AI Citation Visibility Framework: MAHI Index, MAD-M Decay Model, and MAHI-100 Benchmark
description: A reproducible measurement framework for AI visibility across ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews, and Microsoft Copilot. Defines the MAHI Index (Marketing Agent Health Index), the MAD-M (Marketing Agent Decay Model), and the MAHI-100 benchmark for evaluating how AI systems decide which businesses to cite.

creators.name: Shrider, Kristina
creators.affiliation: AI Marketing Research Institute (AIMRI); Market Disruptors Agency, Orlando, FL, USA
